title: Analysing a Comparison Table
instruction: Complete the analysis of the comparison data.
passage: The table shows electricity costs for three ___ over six months. Provider X had the lowest ___ cost at £42.50 per month. Provider Y's costs ___ significantly, ranging from £38 to £55. The ___ across all providers was £45.20 per month. Based on this analysis, Provider X is the most ___ option.
